infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ResQ AI needs location to send your position to emergency services.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ResQ AI needs background location to keep rescue tracking active after an SOS.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: ResQ AI uses background location to keep your emergency GPS link live during a rescue.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: ResQ AI needs motion sensors to detect crashes.
